summary: Drift Threshold Alerting feature fully verified. All 5 new backend endpoints working (drift-alerts/summary, drift-alerts, drift-alerts/evaluate, drift-alerts/{id}/acknowledge, runbooks/inventory_drift_detected). Frontend DriftAlertPanel component renders correctly with TEMIZ status, evaluate button is clickable and functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend drift_alerting.py correctly implements threshold-based alerting (warning: 1+ drift record, critical: 3+ room-night drift, severe: post-recon drift)
Backend dashboard_router.py correctly exposes 4 drift alert endpoints under /api/ops/dashboard/drift-alerts/*
Backend runbooks.py includes inventory_drift_detected runbook with category=sync, severity=critical
Frontend UnifiedOpsView.jsx correctly implements DriftAlertPanel with TEMIZ/WARNING/CRITICAL/SEVERE states
Frontend correctly fetches from drift-alerts/summary and drift-alerts endpoints
Frontend evaluate button triggers POST /api/ops/dashboard/drift-alerts/evaluate and shows toast notification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Drift Threshold Alerting feature verified. Five new endpoints: GET /api/ops/dashboard/drift-alerts/summary (returns active_count, by_severity, highest_severity, recent_alerts), GET /api/ops/dashboard/drift-alerts (returns alerts list with count), POST /api/ops/dashboard/drift-alerts/evaluate (returns evaluated, evidence, alignment_status, alerts_fired), POST /api/ops/dashboard/drift-alerts/{alert_id}/acknowledge (returns 404 for nonexistent, success for valid), GET /api/ops/runbooks/inventory_drift_detected (returns runbook with category=sync, severity=critical). Frontend DriftAlertPanel at /control-plane under Ops Merkezi tab shows TEMIZ status when no alerts, evaluate button triggers evaluation and shows toast. Navigation: Kanallar menu > Control Plane.

POST /api/ops/dashboard/drift-alerts/eva.returns: {evaluated, tenant_id, evaluated_at, window_minutes, evidence: {drift_records, drift_nights, post_recon_drift, providers_with_drift}, alignment_status, freshness, alerts_fired}

POST /api/ops/dashboard/drift-alerts/{al.returns: 404 for nonexistent alert, {success, alert_id, status} for valid

GET /api/ops/runbooks/inventory_drift_de.returns: {id, title, description, category: sync, severity: critical, possible_causes, resolution_steps, retry_instructions, related_operations, prevention}

frontend_elements.drift-alert-panel: PASS - DriftAlertPanel component renders with TEMIZ status
frontend_elements.drift-evaluate-btn: PASS - Evaluate button is clickable and triggers evaluation
frontend_elements.unified-ops-view: PASS - UnifiedOpsView component renders with all blocks
frontend_elements.toast_notification: PASS - Shows 'Drift degerlendirmesi tamamlandi — yeni alarm yok' after evaluation
